case_title: SAYYADINA THOMAS et al VS. GREGORY CRAWFORD et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-12-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AND ENTIRE ACTION

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, SAYYADINA GRAY, SWAN AS TO DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, GREGORY JOHNSON & JOHNSON SERVICES DOES 1-X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-05-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-06-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-21-2005
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-12-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-05-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JAMES M. ROGERS, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-12-2005 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-27-2005. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: VICKI GROSS. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
